experiment.task: ER status binary MLP baseline review

evidence: Confirm train/val/test split is patient-level, not slide-level.
Confirm duplicate slides from the same case do not cross splits.
data_leakage.notes: Fill after checking split_policy_v0 and predictions index.

evidence: Require random, subtype-only, and pixel-mean baselines in metrics.json or companion table.
baseline_comparison.notes: Pass only if MLP is compared against all three agreed baselines.

counterfactual_check.notes: For first ER-status MLP baseline, mark caution/reject if no feature-removal or sanity check is provided and claims exceed baseline scope.

cross_dataset_check.notes: Sprint 1 ER-status baseline may be TCGA-only. Require explicit note if CPTAC is not yet available.

evidence: ER status is biologically plausible as a BRCA phenotype endpoint.
biological_plausibility.notes: No therapeutic hypothesis should be inferred from this baseline alone.

evidence: No drug response prediction, personalized therapy, or patient-specific optimal treatment wording in report outputs.
drp_framing.notes: Recheck README/report text before final pass.

claim_level.notes: Do not change without written exception.

summary: Template only. Replace with review findings after sjpark ER-status MLP artifacts are available.
required_followups: Fill evidence paths and metric values from sjpark experiment artifacts.
Set critic_status to pass only after all required checks pass or justified not_applicable.
